summary: Excellent design: clean module separation, proper error handling, good PowerShell idioms (Set-StrictMode, $ErrorActionPreference, type hints). Workflow correctly uses actions/checkout@v4, shell: pwsh, minimal permissions. Test harness sophisticated (validates exact output). Minor: parameter forwarding via $PSBoundParameters/-1 sentinels is clever but undocumented (Invoke-ArtifactCleanup ~95-100); assertion checking repeats 3x in Run-ActHarness (lines ~70-85) for DELETED/RETAINED/RECLAIMED values; fixture+test files not shown, so coverage/correctness can't be fully verified.
